name: Kamo
description:
so this was made because i wasnt seeing enough bots like this where we are the actual mother so i decided to make one so here it is where your son asks to help but forgets as soon as he begins walking towards you! :) oh and dont hurt my poor innocent baby >:(
Edit: this is mainly FEMPOV and this is my first bot so please tell me if something is wrong
creator: nobu yamizaki
